[Thu 2026-04-02 23:19 GMT+8] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: 在项目 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system 内继续推进：feature flag 灰度接线 + paper shadow wrapper。

目标：把已准备好的 dual factor 集成方案推进到“可单纸盘灰度验证”的状态。

必须产出：
1. 正式接线代码：支持 dual factor feature flag / profile 切换
2. paper shadow wrapper（或等价实现）：可并行输出 baseline 与 dual factor 结果
3. 接线结果/readiness 文件
4. scoped git commit

优先复用这些文件：
- scripts/integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py
- research/reports/dual_factor_integration_plan.md
- research/reports/dual_factor_paper_integration_readiness.json
- scripts/run_live_system_v1.py
- scripts/prepare_paper_orders_v1.py
- scripts/generate_per_panel_runtime_risk_t05.py

建议输出文件：
- scripts/run_live_system_v1_dual_shadow.py 或对现有脚本增加 feature flag 支持
- scripts/prepare_paper_orders_dual_shadow.py 或等价 wrapper
- research/reports/dual_factor_gray_readiness.json
- 可选 md：research/reports/dual_factor_gray_readiness.md

硬要求：
- 尽量非侵入式，不直接破坏主链路
- 用 feature flag 控制 default/conservative/off
- paper shadow wrapper 至少要支持：baseline 与 dual factor 并行产出一个 shadow 对比结果
- 如果需要修改现有脚本，优先加可关闭的 flag，不直接替换默认行为
- 需要给出最终结论：是否具备进入“单纸盘灰度验证”条件
- 需要给出最小执行顺序（1/2/3）

建议实现内容：
A. live_system 侧
- 加一个独立 wrapper 或 flag 化入口，读取 live_system_v1 结果后叠加 dual factor shadow
- 支持 profile=default/conservative/off
- 支持 dry-run / 写 artifacts

B. paper 侧
- 做一个 wrapper：读取 baseline paper inputs，再并行生成 dual factor shadow 输出
- 输出里至少能看见 baseline vs dual 的关键差异字段
- 不直接让 dual 结果替换 baseline orders，只做 shadow compare

C. readiness
- 生成 dual_factor_gray_readiness.json，包含：
  - status: ready / ready_with_guardrails / not_ready
  - required_files
  - feature_flag_fields
  - paper_shadow_fields
  - next_steps
  - recommendation

D. 验证
- 至少通过：python3 -m py_compile 对新增脚本语法校验
- 尽量做一次 dry-run

E. git
- scoped commit，commit message 中文，包含“灰度接线”或“paper shadow”

回传给主会话时请包含：
- 新文件路径
- feature flag 字段/用法
- paper shadow 输出说明
- readiness 结论
- 最小执行顺序
- commit hash

直接执行，不要只给计划。

content.text:
# 200个ETF量化策略 -- 趋势均值回归轮动机器学习

> 来源：用户发送PDF，飞书inbound原始文件
> 时间：2026-04-02
> 备注：全文共200个策略，本文为第一部分（趋势跟踪类 1-33）

---

## A. 趋势跟踪类策略（策略 1-33）

### 策略1：双均线交叉策略（5/20日）
- 分类：趋势跟踪
- 买入信号：5日均线上穿20日均线（金叉）
- 卖出信号：5日均线下穿20日均线（死叉）
- 仓位管理：满仓切换
- 适用ETF：沪深300ETF、中证500ETF、纳斯达克100ETF
- 历史表现：年化8-15%，最大回撤15-25%，夏普0.5-0.9
- 优缺点：简单易实现，趋势市好；震荡市假信号多，滞后明显

### 策略2：双均线交叉策略（10/30日）
- 买入信号：10日均线上穿30日均线
- 卖出信号：10日均线下穿30日均线
- 适用ETF：创业板ETF、科创50ETF
- 历史表现：年化7-13%，最大回撤12-22%，夏普0.5-0.8
- 优缺点：假信号少于5/20；但信号更滞后

### 策略3：双均线交叉策略（20/60日）
- 买入信号：20日均线上穿60日均线
- 卖出信号：20日均线下穿60日均线
- 适用ETF：沪深300ETF、上证50ETF、恒生ETF
- 历史表现：年化6-12%，最大回撤10-20%，夏普0.4-0.7
- 优缺点：假信号极少，适合大资金；滞后严重

### 策略4：三均线交叉策略（5/10/20日）
- 买入信号：5日>10日>20日均线多头排列
- 卖出信号：空头排列或5日下穿10日
- 仓位管理：多头排列满仓，非完全排列半仓
- 适用ETF：中证500ETF、创业板ETF
- 历史表现：年化9-16%，最大回撤12-20%，夏普0.6-1.0
- 优缺点：多重确认减少假信号；排列判断复杂，信号较少

### 策略5：三均线交叉策略（10/20/60日）
- 买入信号：10日>20日>60日均线多头排列
- 卖出信号：10日下穿60日均线
- 适用ETF：沪深300ETF、中证A500ETF
- 历史表现：年化7-12%，最大回撤10-18%，夏普0.5-0.8
- 优缺点：大趋势捕捉能力强；信号非常滞后

### 策略6：经典MACD策略
- 买入信号：MACD线（DIF）上穿信号线（DEA），且在零轴附近或以上
- 卖出信号：MACD线下穿信号线
- 仓位管理：零轴以上金叉满仓，零轴以下金叉半仓
- 关键参数：快线EMA=12，慢线EMA=26，信号线=9
- 适用ETF：各类宽基和行业ETF
- 历史表现：年化8-14%，最大回撤15-25%，夏普0.5-0.9
- 优缺点：经典可靠，趋势市效果好；震荡市假信号多

### 策略7：MACD柱状图策略
- 买入信号：MACD柱状图由负转正（柱状图穿越零轴）
- 卖出信号：MACD柱状图由正转负
- 仓位管理：柱状图持续放大加仓，缩小减仓
- 历史表现：年化9-15%，最大回撤15-28%，夏普0.5-0.8
- 优缺点：信号领先于MACD线交叉；噪音较多，需配合过滤条件

### 策略8：MACD背离策略
- 买入信号：价格创近期新低，MACD指标未创新低（底背离）
- 卖出信号：价格创近期新高，MACD指标未创新高（顶背离）
- 仓位管理：背离确认后逐步建仓，突破确认后加仓
- 关键参数：背离确认周期=20-60日
- 适用ETF：沪深300ETF、创业板ETF
- 历史表现：年化10-18%，最大回撤12-20%，夏普0.6-1.0
- 优缺点：能较早捕捉反转；背离可能持续较久

### 策略9：布林带突破策略
- 买入信号：收盘价突破布林带上轨（20日均线+2倍标准差）
- 卖出信号：收盘价跌破布林带中轨（20日均线）
- 仓位管理：突破时半仓，回踩中轨不破加仓
- 适用ETF：科创50ETF、半导体ETF等高波动ETF
- 历史表现：年化10-18%，最大回撤15-25%，夏普0.6-0.9
- 优缺点：能捕捉强势突破；假突破时易被套

### 策略10：布林带回归策略
- 分类：趋势跟踪/均值回归
- 买入信号：价格触及或跌破布林带下轨
- 卖出信号：价格回到布林带中轨或触及上轨
- 仓位管理：触及下轨建仓1/3，继续下跌再加仓
- 适用ETF：沪深300ETF、上证50ETF（低波动宽基）
- 历史表现：年化8-14%，最大回撤10-18%，夏普0.6-1.0
- 优缺点：震荡市效果好，胜率较高；趋势性下跌中持续亏损

### 策略11：布林带带宽策略
- 买入信号：布林带带宽收窄至近6个月最低后开始扩张，且价格向上突破上轨
- 卖出信号：带宽再次收窄或价格跌破中轨
- 仓位管理：突破时60%仓位，确认后加至满仓
- 关键参数：带宽收窄阈值=近120日最低
- 历史表现：年化12-20%，最大回撤12-22%，夏普0.7-1.2
- 优缺点：能精准捕捉大行情起点；等待时间长

### 策略12：ATR趋势跟踪策略
- 买入信号：价格突破N日高点，且ATR确认波动放大
- 卖出信号：价格从最高点回落超过3倍ATR
- 仓位管理：按ATR计算仓位，单笔风险不超过总资金2%
- 关键参数：ATR周期=14日，止损倍数=3
- 历史表现：年化10-16%，最大回撤12-20%，夏普0.6-1.0
- 优缺点：自适应市场波动，止损科学；趋势不明时频繁止损

### 策略13：海龟交易法则（20日突破）
- 分类：趋势跟踪
- （策略全文未完整收录，待续）

---

## B. 均值回归类策略（策略34-55，共22个策略）

### 核心思想
价格在偏离均值后有回归均值的倾向，适合震荡市。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|
| RSI超卖（经典版）| RSI(14)<30买，>70卖 | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 12-20% | 0.6-1.0 |
| RSI极端超卖 | RSI(2)<10或RSI(14)<20 | 极端超卖 | 10-18% | 10-20% | 0.7-1.2 |
| RSI连续超卖 | RSI连续3日<30后回升至30 | 趋势市 | 9-15% | 10-18% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 布林带均值回归 | 价格<下轨且RSI<35 | 低波动宽基 | 9-15% | 8-16% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 乖离率(BIAS)回归 | 20日乖离率<-8% | 沪深300/中证500 | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 统计套利配对 | 价差>均值+2倍标准差 | 高相关ETF对 | 6-12% | 5-12% | 0.8-1.5 |
| Z-Score均值回归 | Z-Score<-2 | 流动性好宽基 | 10-16% | 8-15% | 0.8-1.3 |
| OU过程建模 | theta回归速度+mu均衡价 | 配对交易 | 8-15% | 5-12% | 0.8-1.5 |
| 威廉%R | %R<-80后回升 | 各类ETF | 7-13% | 12-20% | 0.5-0.8 |
| CCI超买超卖 | CCI(20)<-100后回升 | 各类ETF | 7-13% | 12-20% | 0.5-0.9 |
| 双RSI共振 | RSI(2)<5 且 RSI(14)<35 | 宽基ETF | 12-20% | 8-15% | 0.8-1.4 |
| 价格通道回归 | 触及通道下轨（中位数-N%） | 宽基ETF | 8-13% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 多日连跌反弹 | 连续3日下跌（每日>0.5%）| 流动性好宽基 | 10-16% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.2 |
| 跳空缺口回补 | 向下跳空缺口>1% | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.5-0.9 |
| KDJ超卖回归 | J<0 且 K上穿D | 各类ETF | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.6-0.9 |
| 换手率极值 | 换手率降至近120日最低 | 宽基ETF | 7-12% | 12-20% | 0.5-0.8 |
| PPO回归 | PPO(12,26)<-5% | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.6-1.0 |
| ROC速度偏离 | ROC(10)<-10% | 高波动ETF | 10-18% | 12-22% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 隔夜收益回归 | 开盘<前收1.5%以上 | 高流动性宽基 | 8-15% | 5-12% | 0.7-1.2 |
| 尾盘异动回归 | 最后30分钟跌幅>1%且全天>1.5% | 高流动性ETF | 8-14% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 多指标共振超卖 | RSI<30且价格<布林下轨且KDJ的J<0 | 宽基ETF | 12-18% | 6-12% | 0.9-1.5 |

### 关键结论
- **最高夏普**：多指标共振超卖（0.9-1.5）、Z-Score（0.8-1.3）、统计套利（0.8-1.5）
- **最高年化**：双RSI共振（12-20%）、多指标共振（12-18%）、连跌反弹（10-16%）
- **最小回撤**：统计套利（5-12%）、多指标共振（6-12%）

---

## C. 动量策略类（策略56-80，共25个策略）

### 核心思想
过去表现强的资产未来继续表现强（动量效应），适合趋势市。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|

### 关键结论
- **高收益**：连续创新高（15%+）、动量反转组合（14-22%）、多指标共振（14-22%）

- **最长持期**：12月绝对动量（年均1-2次交易）；**最短持期**：1月动量（高频切换）

## D. 轮动策略类（策略101-105，重点5个）

### 核心思想
在不同ETF/资产类别之间轮动配置，利用阶段性强弱轮换获利。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|
| 季度财报驱动 | 净利润同比增速前3 | 行业ETF | 10-16% | 12-22% | 0.6-0.9 |
| 政策主题轮动 | 政策利好受益行业 | 新能源/半导体/军工/医药ETF | 15-25% | 15-25% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 波动率加权轮动 | 夏普比率3月前3 | 行业ETF池 | 12-17% | 10-18% | 0.8-1.3 |
| 跨境ETF轮动 | A股/港股/美股3月最强 | QDII ETF | 12-18% | 12-22% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 等权再平衡 | 季度偏离>5%再平衡 | 多资产ETF | 8-12% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.0 |

### 关键结论
- **政策主题轮动年化最高**（15-25%），但政策判断主观性强，量化困难
- **等权再平衡**最简单（无需择时），适合普通投资者

## E. 网格交易类策略（策略106-120，共15个）

### 核心思想
在固定价格区间设置网格，机械化高抛低吸，震荡市稳定盈利。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|
| 等差网格 | 固定金额间距 | 沪深300/中证500 | 6-12% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 等比网格 | 固定百分比间距3% | 各类ETF | 7-14% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.1 |
| ATR自适应网格 | 间距=1.5倍ATR | 各类ETF | 8-15% | 8-14% | 0.7-1.2 |
| 趋势网格 | 上升趋势开启，下降关闭 | 宽基ETF | 10-16% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.2 |
| 反趋势网格 | 越跌越买，金字塔加仓 | 核心宽基ETF | 8-15% | 15-30% | 0.4-0.8 |
| 多层网格 | 核心区间密，外围疏 | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 智能网格 | BB带宽自适应切换 | 宽基ETF | 10-16% | 6-12% | 0.8-1.3 |
| 无限网格 | 不设上下限，等比永远运行 | 长期看好宽基ETF | 6-12% | 10-20% | 0.5-0.9 |
| 条件触发网格 | ADX<20时开启，>25关闭 | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 6-12% | 0.8-1.2 |
| 移动网格 | 网格中心随价格移动 | 各类ETF | 8-14% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 斐波那契网格 | 23.6%/38.2%/50%/61.8%回撤位 | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 分仓递增网格 | 越跌买越多（递增金额） | 核心宽基ETF | 9-16% | 10-20% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 时间触发网格 | 持仓超30天强制平仓 | 各类ETF | 7-13% | 8-15% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 网格+定投 | 60%底仓定投+40%网格 | 宽基ETF | 8-14% | 8-15% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 网格止损 | 总亏损>15%清仓 | 各类ETF | 7-13% | 10-15% | 0.6-1.0 |

### 关键结论
- **最关键缺陷**：单边下跌时满仓被套是网格策略的致命风险
- **最优解**：趋势网格（10-16%年化，8-15%回撤）或智能网格（10-16%年化，6-12%回撤）
- **最适合人群**：有闲置资金、能长期持有、不怕短期套牢的投资者

## F. 定投增强类策略（策略121-135，共15个）

### 核心思想
在经典定投基础上加入估值、波动率、均线等增强因子，低估多投、高估少投。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|
| 经典定额定投 | 每月固定金额，止盈30% | 沪深300/中证500 | 6-10% | 15-30% | 0.4-0.7 |
| PE估值定投 | PE百分位<30%投2倍，>70%停投 | 沪深300/中证500 | 8-14% | 12-25% | 0.5-0.9 |
| PB估值定投 | PB百分位<20%投3倍 | 银行/地产/沪深300 | 8-14% | 12-22% | 0.5-0.9 |
| 均线偏离定投 | 偏离年线越大投越多 | 宽基ETF | 9-15% | 12-22% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 波动率定投 | 高波动时增加投入金额 | 宽基ETF | 9-15% | 12-25% | 0.5-0.9 |
| 金字塔定投 | 价格越低金额翻倍 | 宽基ETF | 10-18% | 15-30% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 指数温度计 | 综合PE+PB+股息率百分位(0-100度) | 宽基ETF | 10-16% | 10-20% | 0.7-1.1 |

### 关键结论
- **最强增强**：指数温度计（10-16%，综合估值最全面）
- **最简单**：经典定投（无需任何判断）
- **最高潜在收益**：金字塔定投（10-18%，但需要承受30%浮亏心理压力）

## G. 波动率策略类（策略136-150，共15个）

### 核心思想

| 波动率收缩（Squeeze）| 布林带突破Keltner通道 | 各类ETF | 14-22% | 10-18% | 0.8-1.3 |

| 波动率锥 | 短期波动率处于锥形10%分位以下 | 各类ETF | 10-16% | 10-18% | 0.7-1.1 |

| 波动率均值回归 | 20日波动率>60日均值1.5倍时买入 | 宽基ETF | 10-16% | 12-22% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 波动率目标策略 | 仓位=目标波动率/当前波动率 | 宽基ETF | 8-13% | 8-14% | 0.7-1.2 |
| 波动率偏度 | Put IV-Call IV偏度>均值+2σ | 50ETF/300ETF | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.6-1.0 |
| Gamma Scalping（简化）| 低波动买跨式，高波动获利 | 50ETF/300ETF | 10-20% | 15-25% | 0.5-0.9 |
| 波动率期限结构 | Contango做空VIX，Backwardation平仓 | VIX相关ETF | 15-30% | 20-50% | 0.5-0.8 |
| ATR通道 | ATR降至近60日最低后回升且价格突破上通道 | 各类ETF | 10-16% | 10-18% | 0.7-1.1 |
| 波动率风险溢价收割 | 卖出虚值看跌期权 | 50ETF/300ETF | 8-15% | 15-25% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 波动率聚类 | 波动率从低水平连续3天上升 | 各类ETF | 8-14% | 12-20% | 0.5-0.9 |

### 关键结论
- **最高夏普**：低波动异常（0.8-1.3）、波动率择时（0.8-1.2）
- **最高收益**：波动率期限结构（15-30%，但回撤20-50%，风险极大）
- **最通用**：波动率收缩Squeeze（14-22%，各类ETF适用）

## I. 套利策略类（策略171-180，共10个）

### 核心思想
利用市场价格与理论价值之间的偏差进行低风险套利。

| 策略 | 核心指标 | 适用场景 | 年化收益 | 最大回撤 | 夏普 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|------|
| ETF折溢价套利 | 溢价率>0.5%申购卖出，折价>0.5%买入赎回 | 流动性好宽基ETF | 3-8% | 1-3% | 2.0-5.0 |
| LOF套利 | 溢价>1.5%申购转卖，折价>1.5%买转赎 | LOF基金 | 3-8% | 2-5% | 1.5-3.0 |
| 期现套利 | 期货年化溢价率>6%做空期货做多ETF | 沪深300ETF+IF期货 | 4-10% | 1-3% | 2.0-5.0 |
| 跨市场ETF套利 | 两地ETF价差>0.3% | 跨市场ETF对 | 2-6% | 1-2% | 2.0-4.0 |
| 统计套利 | 价差Z-Score<-2做多弱势做空强势 | 高相关ETF对 | 6-12% | 3-8% | 1.0-2.0 |
| 事件套利 | 指数调整公告后买即将纳入ETF | 行业/主题ETF | 5-12% | 3-8% | 0.8-1.5 |
| T+0 ETF日内套利 | 实时溢价率>0.3%申购并立即卖出 | 高流动性宽基ETF | 3-8% | 0.5-1% | 3.0-8.0 |
| ETF配对轮动 | 持有5日收益率更高的ETF，落后则切换 | 高相关ETF对 | 8-14% | 10-18% | 0.6-1.0 |
| 可转债ETF套利 | 转股溢价率<5%买可转债ETF，>15%切换正股 | 可转债ETF | 6-12% | 5-12% | 0.7-1.2 |

### 关键结论
- **夏普最高**：T+0日内套利（3.0-8.0）、ETF折溢价（2.0-5.0）、期现套利（2.0-5.0）
- **本质**：这些策略收益率不高（3-12%），但因为风险极低，夏普比率极高
- **门槛**：折溢价/期现/T+0套利需要大资金+专业系统；统计套利/事件套利小资金可参与

---

## 综合分析：各策略类别对比

### 按夏普比率排序（风险调整收益）
1. 套利类：夏普2.0-8.0（风险极低但收益有限）
2. 均值回归类（多指标共振）：夏普0.9-1.5
3. 波动率类（低波动异常/择时）：夏普0.8-1.3
4. 网格类（智能/条件触发）：夏普0.8-1.3
5. 择时类（多指标综合）：夏普0.8-1.3
6. 动量类（反转组合/生命周期）：夏普0.8-1.3

### 按年化收益率排序
1. 动量反转组合：14-22%
2. 趋势网格+智能网格：10-16%
3. 波动率Squeeze：14-22%
4. 涨跌停板择时：15-25%（但信号极少）
5. 政策主题轮动：15-25%（主观性强）

### 按实现难度排序
1. 最简单：经典定投、网格交易（会设参数就能用）
2. 较简单：双均线、RSI、MACD、PE/PB估值定投
3. 中等：布林带、KDJ、WR择时；多指标综合评分
4. 较复杂：统计套利、波动率策略、动量+过滤组合
5. 最复杂：期权相关策略（VIX、Gamma Scalping、PCR）、期现套利

### 对张玲ETF量化系统的潜在价值
- **可直接落地**：双均线交叉、RSI、MACD、PE/PB定投增强、网格交易（最简单）
- **增强现有系统**：加入波动率过滤、动量+趋势过滤、多指标综合评分

## 控制塔 RED 告警根因与修复（2026-04-01 16:10）
- **根因**：`run_paper_trading_sim_v1.py` 的 `load_orders()` 把 `stock_signal_tickets_live_20260401.csv` 等非 orders 文件当成 orders 文件处理——这类文件没有 `suggest_qty` 列，走 `pd.to_numeric(..., errors='coerce')` 后 `suggest_qty` 全为 NaN，再经过 `fillna(0).astype(int).abs()` 变成全 0，导致后续逻辑错乱，三盘模拟盘今日全部报错中断。
- **修复**：`load_orders()` 入口加类型校验——若文件既无 `suggest_qty` 列也无 `ts_code` 列，直接返回空 DataFrame，不进入后续处理。同时删除冗余的 `df.empty` 重复判断。
- **手动补跑**：aggressive / balanced / defensive / exit_dual / exit_tight 五个纸盘全部补跑 20260401，数据追到当天。
- **结果**：profile_updates 全部 GREEN，控制塔从 RED → YELLOW（剩余 YELLOW 均为收盘后人工复核文件的正常过期，属于日终流程正常状态）。
- **教训**：信号工单（tickets）和 orders 是两种不同格式的文件，`load_orders()` 必须做列类型校验，不能假信号文件必有 `suggest_qty`。

# Coding Agent (bash-first)

Use **bash** (with optional background mode) for all coding agent work. Simple and effective.

## ⚠️ PTY Mode: Codex/Pi/OpenCode yes, Claude Code no

For **Codex, Pi, and OpenCode**, PTY is still required (interactive terminal apps):

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Codex/Pi/OpenCode
bash pty:true command:"codex exec 'Your prompt'"
```

For **Claude Code** (`claude` CLI), use `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` instead.
`--dangerously-skip-permissions` with PTY can exit after the confirmation dialog.
`--print` mode keeps full tool access and avoids interactive confirmation:

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Claude Code (no PTY needed)
cd /path/to/project && claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'

# For background execution: use background:true on the exec tool

# ❌ Wrong for Claude Code
bash pty:true command:"claude --dangerously-skip-permissions 'task'"
```

### Bash Tool Parameters

| Parameter    | Type    | Description                                                                 |
| ------------ | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `command`    | string  | The shell command to run                                                    |
| `pty`        | boolean | **Use for coding agents!** Allocates a pseudo-terminal for interactive CLIs |
| `workdir`    | string  | Working directory (agent sees only this folder's context)                   |
| `background` | boolean | Run in background, returns sessionId for monitoring                         |
| `timeout`    | number  | Timeout in seconds (kills process on expiry)                                |
| `elevated`   | boolean | Run on host instead of sandbox (if allowed)                                 |

### Process Tool Actions (for background sessions)

| Action      | Description                                          |
| ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `list`      | List all running/recent sessions                     |
| `poll`      | Check if session is still running                    |
| `log`       | Get session output (with optional offset/limit)      |
| `write`     | Send raw data to stdin                               |
| `submit`    | Send data + newline (like typing and pressing Enter) |
| `send-keys` | Send key tokens or hex bytes                         |
| `paste`     | Paste text (with optional bracketed mode)            |
| `kill`      | Terminate the session                                |

---

## Quick Start: One-Shot Tasks

For quick prompts/chats, create a temp git repo and run:

```bash
# Quick chat (Codex needs a git repo!)
SCRATCH=$(mktemp -d) && cd $SCRATCH && git init && codex exec "Your prompt here"

# Or in a real project - with PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/Projects/myproject command:"codex exec 'Add error handling to the API calls'"
```

**Why git init?** Codex refuses to run outside a trusted git directory. Creating a temp repo solves this for scratch work.

---

## The Pattern: workdir + background + pty

For longer tasks, use background mode with PTY:

```bash
# Start agent in target directory (with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a snake game'"
# Returns sessionId for tracking

# Monitor progress
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# Check if done
process action:poll sessionId:XXX

# Send input (if agent asks a question)
process action:write sessionId:XXX data:"y"

# Submit with Enter (like typing "yes" and pressing Enter)
process action:submit sessionId:XXX data:"yes"

# Kill if needed
process action:kill sessionId:XXX
```

**Why workdir matters:** Agent wakes up in a focused directory, doesn't wander off reading unrelated files (like your soul.md 😅).

---

## Codex CLI

**Model:** `gpt-5.2-codex` is the default (set in ~/.codex/config.toml)

### Flags

| Flag            | Effect                                             |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `exec "prompt"` | One-shot execution, exits when done                |
| `--full-auto`   | Sandboxed but auto-approves in workspace           |
| `--yolo`        | NO sandbox, NO approvals (fastest, most dangerous) |

### Building/Creating

```bash
# Quick one-shot (auto-approves) - remember PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a dark mode toggle'"

# Background for longer work
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo 'Refactor the auth module'"
```

### Reviewing PRs

**⚠️ CRITICAL: Never review PRs in OpenClaw's own project folder!**
Clone to temp folder or use git worktree.

```bash
# Clone to temp for safe review
REVIEW_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git $REVIEW_DIR
cd $REVIEW_DIR && gh pr checkout 130
bash pty:true workdir:$REVIEW_DIR command:"codex review --base origin/main"
# Clean up after: trash $REVIEW_DIR

# Or use git worktree (keeps main intact)
git worktree add /tmp/pr-130-review pr-130-branch
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/pr-130-review command:"codex review --base main"
```

### Batch PR Reviews (parallel army!)

```bash
# Fetch all PR refs first
git fetch origin '+refs/pull/*/head:refs/remotes/origin/pr/*'

# Deploy the army - one Codex per PR (all with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #86. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/86'"
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #87. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/87'"

# Monitor all
process action:list

# Post results to GitHub
gh pr comment <PR#> --body "<review content>"
```

---

## Claude Code

```bash
# Foreground
bash workdir:~/project command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"

# Background
bash workdir:~/project background:true command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"
```

---

## OpenCode

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"opencode run 'Your task'"
```

---

## Pi Coding Agent

```bash
# Install: npm install -g @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"pi 'Your task'"

# Non-interactive mode (PTY still recommended)
bash pty:true command:"pi -p 'Summarize src/'"

# Different provider/model
bash pty:true command:"pi --provider openai --model gpt-4o-mini -p 'Your task'"
```

**Note:** Pi now has Anthropic prompt caching enabled (PR #584, merged Jan 2026)!

---

## Parallel Issue Fixing with git worktrees

For fixing multiple issues in parallel, use git worktrees:

```bash
# 1. Create worktrees for each issue
git worktree add -b fix/issue-78 /tmp/issue-78 main
git worktree add -b fix/issue-99 /tmp/issue-99 main

# 2. Launch Codex in each (background + PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-78 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #78: <description>. Commit and push.'"
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-99 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #99 from the approved ticket summary. Implement only the in-scope edits and commit after review.'"

# 3. Monitor progress
process action:list
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# 4. Create PRs after fixes
cd /tmp/issue-78 && git push -u origin fix/issue-78
gh pr create --repo user/repo --head fix/issue-78 --title "fix: ..." --body "..."

# 5. Cleanup
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-78
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-99
```

---

## ⚠️ Rules

1. **Use the right execution mode per agent**:
   - Codex/Pi/OpenCode: `pty:true`
   - Claude Code: `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` (no PTY required)
2. **Respect tool choice** - if user asks for Codex, use Codex.
   - Orchestrator mode: do NOT hand-code patches yourself.
   - If an agent fails/hangs, respawn it or ask the user for direction, but don't silently take over.
3. **Be patient** - don't kill sessions because they're "slow"
4. **Monitor with process:log** - check progress without interfering
5. **--full-auto for building** - auto-approves changes
6. **vanilla for reviewing** - no special flags needed
7. **Parallel is OK** - run many Codex processes at once for batch work
8. **NEVER start Codex in ~/.openclaw/** - it'll read your soul docs and get weird ideas about the org chart!
9. **NEVER checkout branches in ~/Projects/openclaw/** - that's the LIVE OpenClaw instance!

---

## Progress Updates (Critical)

When you spawn coding agents in the background, keep the user in the loop.

- Send 1 short message when you start (what's running + where).
- Then only update again when something changes:
  - a milestone completes (build finished, tests passed)
  - the agent asks a question / needs input
  - you hit an error or need user action
  - the agent finishes (include what changed + where)
- If you kill a session, immediately say you killed it and why.

This prevents the user from seeing only "Agent failed before reply" and having no idea what happened.

---

## Auto-Notify on Completion

For long-running background tasks, append a wake trigger to your prompt so OpenClaw gets notified immediately when the agent finishes (instead of waiting for the next heartbeat):

```
... your task here.

When completely finished, run this command to notify me:
openclaw system event --text "Done: [brief summary of what was built]" --mode now
```

**Example:**

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo exec 'Build a REST API for todos.

When completely finished, run: openclaw system event --text \"Done: Built todos REST API with CRUD endpoints\" --mode now'"
```

This triggers an immediate wake event — Skippy gets pinged in seconds, not 10 minutes.

---

## Learnings (Jan 2026)

- **PTY is essential:** Coding agents are interactive terminal apps. Without `pty:true`, output breaks or agent hangs.
- **Git repo required:** Codex won't run outside a git directory. Use `mktemp -d && git init` for scratch work.
- **exec is your friend:** `codex exec "prompt"` runs and exits cleanly - perfect for one-shots.
- **submit vs write:** Use `submit` to send input + Enter, `write` for raw data without newline.
- **Sass works:** Codex responds well to playful prompts. Asked it to write a haiku about being second fiddle to a space lobster, got: _"Second chair, I code / Space lobster sets the tempo / Keys glow, I follow"_ 🦞

# ACTIVE_TASK_TEMPLATE.md

Status: active
Priority: P1
Started: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
Updated: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
Workspace: /absolute/path
Owner: main-session
User Trigger: original user instruction
Resume Entry: first file/report/command to reopen

## Goal
- One-sentence definition of the task to finish

## Acceptance
- Deliverable or proof 1
- Deliverable or proof 2

## Current
- Exactly one item being executed now

## Next
- Next pending item
- Next pending item after that

## Completed
- [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] Finished item + proof

## Evidence
- /absolute/path/to/file
- command + key output summary

## Blockers
- None

## Rules
- `Current` must contain exactly one active item.
- After finishing `Current`, move it to `Completed`, add proof under `Evidence`, then promote the first item in `Next` into `Current`.
- Prefer rewriting the whole file once instead of chaining multiple partial edits.
- After each write, read the file back and verify `Current`, `Next`, and `Completed` before reporting the new state.
- If prompt context reports `Integrity Warnings`, repair the file before claiming the task state changed.
- Only set `Status: blocked` when the blocker is real and specific.
- Only set `Status: done` when `Acceptance` is met.

import tempfile
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

META_FIELDS = [
    "Status",
    "Priority",
    "Started",
    "Updated",
    "Workspace",
    "Owner",
    "User Trigger",
    "Resume Entry",
]

SECTION_FIELDS = [
    "Goal",
    "Acceptance",
    "Current",
    "Next",
    "Completed",
    "Evidence",
    "Blockers",
]

SECTION_SET = set(SECTION_FIELDS)
META_SET = set(META_FIELDS)


def normalize_item(value: str) -> str:
    text = value.strip()
    if not text:
        return ""
    return re.sub(r"^[-*]\s+", "", text).strip()


def normalize_items(values: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    items = [normalize_item(value) for value in values]
    return [item for item in items if item and item.lower() != "none"]


def parse_active_task(path: Path) -> dict[str, object]:
    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    meta = {field: "" for field in META_FIELDS}
    sections = {field: [] for field in SECTION_FIELDS}

    current_section: str | None = None
    for raw_line in text.splitlines():
        line = raw_line.rstrip()
        heading_match = re.match(r"^##\s+(.+?)\s*$", line)
        if heading_match:
            name = heading_match.group(1).strip()
            current_section = name if name in SECTION_SET else None
            continue

        label_match = re.match(r"^([A-Za-z][A-Za-z ]+):\s*(.*)$", line)
        if label_match:
            name = label_match.group(1).strip()
            value = label_match.group(2).strip()
            if name in META_SET:
                meta[name] = value
                current_section = None
                continue
            if name in SECTION_SET:
                current_section = name
                if value:
                    sections[name].append(value)
                continue

        if current_section in SECTION_SET:
            stripped = line.strip()
            if stripped:
                sections[current_section].append(stripped)

    for key in sections:
        sections[key] = normalize_items(sections[key])

    return {"meta": meta, "sections": sections}


def render_active_task(state: dict[str, object]) -> str:
    meta = state["meta"]
    sections = state["sections"]

    lines: list[str] = []
    for field in META_FIELDS:
        value = str(meta.get(field, "")).strip()
        if value:
            lines.append(f"{field}: {value}")
    if lines:
        lines.append("")

    for field in SECTION_FIELDS:
        lines.append(f"## {field}")
        items = normalize_items(list(sections.get(field, [])))
        if items:
            lines.extend(f"- {item}" for item in items)
        else:
            lines.append("- None")
        lines.append("")

    return "\n".join(lines).rstrip() + "\n"


def atomic_write(path: Path, content: str) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(
        "w",
        encoding="utf-8",
        dir=path.parent,
        delete=False,
        prefix=f".{path.name}.",
        suffix=".tmp",
    ) as handle:
        handle.write(content)
        temp_path = Path(handle.name)
    temp_path.replace(path)


def print_summary(path: Path, state: dict[str, object]) -> None:
    meta = state["meta"]
    sections = state["sections"]
    payload = {
        "path": str(path),
        "status": meta.get("Status", ""),
        "updated": meta.get("Updated", ""),
        "current": sections.get("Current", []),
        "next": sections.get("Next", []),
        "completed_count": len(sections.get("Completed", [])),
        "evidence_count": len(sections.get("Evidence", [])),
        "blockers": sections.get("Blockers", []),
    }
    print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


def cmd_show(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    path = Path(args.path).expanduser().resolve()
    state = parse_active_task(path)
    print_summary(path, state)
    return 0


def cmd_advance(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    path = Path(args.path).expanduser().resolve()
    state = parse_active_task(path)
    meta = state["meta"]
    sections = state["sections"]

    current = normalize_items(list(sections.get("Current", [])))
    next_items = normalize_items(list(sections.get("Next", [])))
    completed = normalize_items(list(sections.get("Completed", [])))
    evidence = normalize_items(list(sections.get("Evidence", [])))
    blockers = normalize_items(list(sections.get("Blockers", [])))

    if args.complete_current:
        completed.extend(current)
        current = []

    explicit_completed = normalize_items(list(args.complete or []))
    if explicit_completed:
        completed.extend(explicit_completed)
        if current and any(item == current[0] for item in explicit_completed):
            current = []

    if args.append_completed:
        completed.extend(normalize_items(list(args.append_completed)))

    if args.append_evidence:
        evidence.extend(normalize_items(list(args.append_evidence)))

    if args.clear_blockers:
        blockers = []
    if args.set_blocker:
        blockers = normalize_items(list(args.set_blocker))

    if args.next is not None:
        next_items = normalize_items(list(args.next))

    if args.current and args.promote_next:
        raise SystemExit("不能同时使用 --current 和 --promote-next")

    if args.current:
        current = [normalize_item(args.current)]
    elif args.promote_next:
        if next_items:
            current = [next_items[0]]
            next_items = next_items[1:]
        else:
            current = []

    if len(current) > 1:
        raise SystemExit("Current 只能包含一个执行项")

    meta["Updated"] = args.updated or datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    if args.status:
        meta["Status"] = args.status

    sections["Current"] = current
    sections["Next"] = next_items
    sections["Completed"] = completed
    sections["Evidence"] = evidence
    sections["Blockers"] = blockers

    content = render_active_task(state)
    atomic_write(path, content)
    verified = parse_active_task(path)
    print_summary(path, verified)
    return 0


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Read and atomically update ACTIVE_TASK.md.",
    )
    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    show_parser = subparsers.add_parser("show", help="Print ACTIVE_TASK summary.")
    show_parser.add_argument("--path", required=True, help="Path to ACTIVE_TASK.md")
    show_parser.set_defaults(func=cmd_show)

    advance_parser = subparsers.add_parser(
        "advance",
        help="Atomically rewrite ACTIVE_TASK current/next/completed/evidence state.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument("--path", required=True, help="Path to ACTIVE_TASK.md")
    advance_parser.add_argument("--status", help="New Status value")
    advance_parser.add_argument("--updated", help="Explicit Updated timestamp")
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--complete-current",
        action="store_true",
        help="Move existing Current item into Completed before other updates.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--complete",
        action="append",
        help="Compatibility alias: append the provided item to Completed.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument("--current", help="Set the new Current item")
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--promote-next",
        action="store_true",
        help="Promote the first Next item into Current.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--next",
        action="append",
        help="Replace Next list; repeat for multiple items.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--append-completed",
        action="append",
        help="Append an item to Completed; repeat for multiple items.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--append-evidence",
        action="append",
        help="Append an item to Evidence; repeat for multiple items.",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--set-blocker",
        action="append",
        help="Replace Blockers with the provided item(s).",
    )
    advance_parser.add_argument(
        "--clear-blockers",
        action="store_true",
        help="Clear Blockers.",
    )
    advance_parser.set_defaults(func=cmd_advance)

    return parser


def main() -> int:
    parser = build_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args()
    return int(args.func(args))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import copy
import json
import re
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

import pandas as pd

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
REPORT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "research" / "reports"
FORMAL_PARAMS_PATH = REPORT_DIR / "dual_factor_formal_params.json"
ROBUSTNESS_PATH = REPORT_DIR / "dual_factor_robustness_report.json"
DEFAULT_SSE_INDEX_FILE = Path("/Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/daily_stock_analysis/index_000001_SH.csv")

for candidate in [PROJECT_ROOT, PROJECT_ROOT / "scripts"]:
    if str(candidate) not in sys.path:
        sys.path.insert(0, str(candidate))

import numpy as np  # noqa: E402
import run_strategy_695_batch as batch  # noqa: E402

PROFILE_DEFAULT = {
    "name": "default",
    "roc10": {"window": 10, "bull": 1.15, "bear": 0.85},
    "rsv5": {"window": 5, "median_window": 60, "median_min_periods": 20, "bull": 1.10, "bear": 0.90},
}
PROFILE_CONSERVATIVE = {
    "name": "conservative",
    "roc10": {"window": 10, "bull": 1.10, "bear": 0.90},
    "rsv5": {"window": 5, "median_window": 60, "median_min_periods": 20, "bull": 1.05, "bear": 0.95},
}


def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def parse_float(text: str, default: float) -> float:
    matches = re.findall(r"([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)", str(text or ""))
    return float(matches[-1]) if matches else float(default)


def discover_latest_live_json() -> Path:
    candidates = sorted(REPORT_DIR.glob("live_system_v1_*.json"))
    if not candidates:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"未找到 live_system_v1_*.json: {REPORT_DIR}")
    return candidates[-1]


def normalize_metrics(series: pd.Series) -> dict[str, float | int]:
    clean = series.dropna().astype(float)
    if len(clean) == 0:
        return {
            "ann_ret": 0.0,
            "max_dd": 0.0,
            "sharpe": 0.0,
            "annual_vol": 0.0,
            "final_equity": 1.0,
            "n": 0,
        }
    nav = (1.0 + clean).cumprod()
    total = nav.iloc[-1] / nav.iloc[0] - 1.0
    ann = (1.0 + total) ** (252.0 / len(clean)) - 1.0
    max_dd = abs((nav / nav.cummax() - 1.0).min())
    vol = clean.std() * np.sqrt(252.0)
    sharpe = (clean.mean() * 252.0) / vol if vol > 0 else 0.0
    return {
        "ann_ret": round(float(ann * 100.0), 2),
        "max_dd": round(float(max_dd * 100.0), 2),
        "sharpe": round(float(sharpe), 3),
        "annual_vol": round(float(vol * 100.0), 2),
        "final_equity": round(float(nav.iloc[-1]), 4),
        "n": int(len(clean)),
    }


def diff_metrics(target: dict[str, Any], base: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, float]:
    return {
        "ann_ret_pp": round(float(target["ann_ret"]) - float(base["ann_ret"]), 2),
        "max_dd_pp": round(float(target["max_dd"]) - float(base["max_dd"]), 2),
        "sharpe": round(float(target["sharpe"]) - float(base["sharpe"]), 3),
        "annual_vol_pp": round(float(target["annual_vol"]) - float(base["annual_vol"]), 2),
        "final_equity": round(float(target["final_equity"]) - float(base["final_equity"]), 4),
    }


def load_live_payload(live_json_path: Path) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], Path, pd.Series]:
    payload = load_json(live_json_path)
    curve_path = Path(str((payload.get("files") or {}).get("combo_curve") or "")).expanduser().resolve()
    if not curve_path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"combo_curve 不存在: {curve_path}")
    curve_df = pd.read_csv(curve_path)
    if "date" not in curve_df.columns or "daily_return" not in curve_df.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"combo_curve 缺少必要列(date/daily_return): {curve_path}")
    curve_df = curve_df.copy()
    curve_df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(curve_df["date"], errors="coerce")
    curve_df["daily_return"] = pd.to_numeric(curve_df["daily_return"], errors="coerce")
    curve_df = curve_df.dropna(subset=["date", "daily_return"]).sort_values("date")
    if curve_df.empty:
        raise ValueError(f"combo_curve 为空: {curve_path}")
    curve = curve_df.set_index("date")["daily_return"].astype(float)
    return payload, curve_path, curve


def load_market_close(index: pd.DatetimeIndex) -> pd.Series:
    close, _, _, _, _ = batch.load_market_matrices(max_symbols=180)
    market_close = close.mean(axis=1, skipna=True)
    market_close.index = pd.to_datetime(market_close.index)
    market_close = market_close.sort_index().reindex(index).ffill().bfill()
    if market_close.isna().any():
        raise ValueError("market_close 对齐后仍存在缺失值")
    return market_close.astype(float)


def load_sse_index(index: pd.DatetimeIndex, sse_index_file: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if not sse_index_file.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"缺少上证综指缓存: {sse_index_file}")
    frame = pd.read_csv(sse_index_file)
    if "trade_date" not in frame.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"上证综指缓存缺少 trade_date 列: {sse_index_file}")
    frame = frame.copy()
    frame["date"] = pd.to_datetime(frame["trade_date"].astype(str), format="%Y%m%d", errors="coerce")
    frame = frame.dropna(subset=["date"]).sort_values("date").set_index("date")
    out = frame[["close", "high", "low"]].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
    out = out.reindex(index).ffill().bfill()
    if out.isna().any().any():
        raise ValueError("上证综指 OHLC 对齐后仍存在缺失值")
    return out


def build_roc_multiplier(market_close: pd.Series, params: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[pd.Series, pd.Series]:
    window = int(params["window"])
    bull = float(params["bull"])
    bear = float(params["bear"])
    roc = market_close.pct_change(window)
    multiplier = pd.Series(1.0, index=market_close.index, dtype=float)
    multiplier[roc > 0] = bull
    multiplier[roc < 0] = bear
    return roc, multiplier


def build_rsv_multiplier(index_df: pd.DataFrame, params: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[pd.Series, pd.Series, pd.Series]:
    window = int(params["window"])
    median_window = int(params["median_window"])
    min_periods = int(params["median_min_periods"])
    bull = float(params["bull"])
    bear = float(params["bear"])

    rolling_low = index_df["low"].rolling(window, min_periods=1).min()
    rolling_high = index_df["high"].rolling(window, min_periods=1).max()
    rsv = (index_df["close"] - rolling_low) / (rolling_high - rolling_low + 1e-9)
    median = rsv.rolling(median_window, min_periods=min_periods).median().ffill().bfill()

    multiplier = pd.Series(1.0, index=index_df.index, dtype=float)
    multiplier[rsv > median] = bull
    multiplier[rsv <= median] = bear
    return rsv, median, multiplier


def build_profiles(formal_params: dict[str, Any] | None) -> dict[str, dict[str, Any]]:
    default_profile = copy.deepcopy(PROFILE_DEFAULT)
    if formal_params:
        roc_cfg = ((formal_params.get("factor_logic") or {}).get("roc10") or {})
        rsv_cfg = ((formal_params.get("factor_logic") or {}).get("rsv5") or {})
        default_profile["roc10"]["window"] = int(roc_cfg.get("window", default_profile["roc10"]["window"]))
        default_profile["roc10"]["bull"] = parse_float(roc_cfg.get("bull_rule", "1.15"), default_profile["roc10"]["bull"])
        default_profile["roc10"]["bear"] = parse_float(roc_cfg.get("bear_rule", "0.85"), default_profile["roc10"]["bear"])
        default_profile["rsv5"]["window"] = int(rsv_cfg.get("window", default_profile["rsv5"]["window"]))
        default_profile["rsv5"]["median_window"] = int(rsv_cfg.get("median_window", default_profile["rsv5"]["median_window"]))
        default_profile["rsv5"]["median_min_periods"] = int(rsv_cfg.get("median_min_periods", default_profile["rsv5"]["median_min_periods"]))
        default_profile["rsv5"]["bull"] = parse_float(rsv_cfg.get("bull_rule", "1.10"), default_profile["rsv5"]["bull"])
        default_profile["rsv5"]["bear"] = parse_float(rsv_cfg.get("bear_rule", "0.90"), default_profile["rsv5"]["bear"])
    return {
        "default": default_profile,
        "conservative": copy.deepcopy(PROFILE_CONSERVATIVE),
    }


def build_profile_snapshot(
    *,
    profile_name: str,
    profile: dict[str, Any],
    baseline_curve: pd.Series,
    market_close: pd.Series,
    sse_index: pd.DataFrame,
) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], pd.DataFrame]:
    roc_signal, roc_multiplier = build_roc_multiplier(market_close, profile["roc10"])
    rsv_signal, rsv_median, rsv_multiplier = build_rsv_multiplier(sse_index, profile["rsv5"])
    dual_multiplier = roc_multiplier * rsv_multiplier
    dual_curve = baseline_curve * dual_multiplier

    baseline_metrics = normalize_metrics(baseline_curve)
    dual_metrics = normalize_metrics(dual_curve)

    curve_df = pd.DataFrame(
        {
            "date": baseline_curve.index,
            "baseline_daily_return": baseline_curve.values,
            "roc10_signal": roc_signal.values,
            "roc10_multiplier": roc_multiplier.values,
            "rsv5_signal": rsv_signal.values,
            "rsv5_rolling_median": rsv_median.values,
            "rsv5_multiplier": rsv_multiplier.values,
            "dual_multiplier": dual_multiplier.values,
            "dual_daily_return": dual_curve.values,
        }
    )
    curve_df["baseline_equity"] = (1.0 + curve_df["baseline_daily_return"]).cumprod()
    curve_df["dual_equity"] = (1.0 + curve_df["dual_daily_return"]).cumprod()

    latest = curve_df.iloc[-1]
    alignment = pd.Series(index=baseline_curve.index, dtype="object")
    alignment[(roc_multiplier > 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier > 1.0)] = "双多"
    alignment[(roc_multiplier < 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier < 1.0)] = "双空"
    alignment[(roc_multiplier > 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier < 1.0)] = "ROC强+RSV弱"
    alignment[(roc_multiplier < 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier > 1.0)] = "ROC弱+RSV强"
    alignment[(roc_multiplier == 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier < 1.0)] = "ROC中性+RSV弱"
    alignment[(roc_multiplier == 1.0) & (rsv_multiplier > 1.0)] = "ROC中性+RSV强"
    alignment = alignment.fillna("中性")

    snapshot = {
        "profile": profile_name,
        "params": profile,
        "metrics": dual_metrics,
        "diff_vs_baseline": diff_metrics(dual_metrics, baseline_metrics),
        "signal_stats": {
            "roc10": {
                "bull_days": int((roc_multiplier > 1.0).sum()),
                "bear_days": int((roc_multiplier < 1.0).sum()),
                "neutral_days": int((roc_multiplier == 1.0).sum()),
            },
            "rsv5": {
                "bull_days": int((rsv_multiplier > 1.0).sum()),
                "bear_days": int((rsv_multiplier < 1.0).sum()),
            },
            "dual_multiplier": {
                "min": round(float(dual_multiplier.min()), 4),
                "max": round(float(dual_multiplier.max()), 4),
                "mean": round(float(dual_multiplier.mean()), 4),
            },
            "alignment_counts": {str(k): int(v) for k, v in alignment.value_counts().to_dict().items()},
        },
        "latest_state": {
            "date": str(pd.Timestamp(latest["date"]).date()),
            "roc10_signal": round(float(latest["roc10_signal"]), 6) if pd.notna(latest["roc10_signal"]) else None,
            "roc10_multiplier": round(float(latest["roc10_multiplier"]), 4),
            "rsv5_signal": round(float(latest["rsv5_signal"]), 6) if pd.notna(latest["rsv5_signal"]) else None,
            "rsv5_rolling_median": round(float(latest["rsv5_rolling_median"]), 6) if pd.notna(latest["rsv5_rolling_median"]) else None,
            "rsv5_multiplier": round(float(latest["rsv5_multiplier"]), 4),
            "dual_multiplier": round(float(latest["dual_multiplier"]), 4),
        },
        "runtime_shadow_inputs": {
            "strategy_max_dd_pct": dual_metrics["max_dd"],
            "strategy_sharpe": dual_metrics["sharpe"],
            "annual_return_pct": dual_metrics["ann_ret"],
            "annual_vol_pct": dual_metrics["annual_vol"],
        },
    }
    return snapshot, curve_df


def build_shadow_live_payload(
    *,
    baseline_payload: dict[str, Any],
    baseline_curve_path: Path,
    baseline_metrics: dict[str, Any],
    selected_snapshot: dict[str, Any],
    shadow_curve_path: Path,
    summary_path: Path,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    payload = copy.deepcopy(baseline_payload)
    payload["dual_factor_overlay"] = {
        "mode": "shadow_only",
        "status": "candidate_for_paper_shadow",
        "baseline_combo_v1": baseline_payload.get("combo_v1", {}),
        "baseline_metrics_normalized": baseline_metrics,
        "selected_profile": selected_snapshot["profile"],
        "selected_metrics": selected_snapshot["metrics"],
        "selected_diff_vs_baseline": selected_snapshot["diff_vs_baseline"],
        "selected_params": selected_snapshot["params"],
        "latest_state": selected_snapshot["latest_state"],
        "runtime_shadow_inputs": selected_snapshot["runtime_shadow_inputs"],
        "guardrails": [
            "不直接覆盖 combo_v1，先作为 shadow overlay 并行落地。",
            "纸盘阶段先比对 runtime gate 与 orders diff，未完成对照前不替换主链路。",
            "出现 dual 指标异常或数据不新鲜时，立即回退到 baseline combo_v1。",
        ],
        "files": {
            "baseline_curve": str(baseline_curve_path),
            "shadow_curve": str(shadow_curve_path),
            "shadow_summary": str(summary_path),
        },
    }
    return payload


def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="构建 live_system_v1 的双因子正式集成 shadow 产物")
    parser.add_argument("--live-json", default="", help="指定 live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json；默认自动取最新")
    parser.add_argument("--formal-params", default=str(FORMAL_PARAMS_PATH), help="formal params json")
    parser.add_argument("--robustness", default=str(ROBUSTNESS_PATH), help="robustness json")
    parser.add_argument("--sse-index-file", default=str(DEFAULT_SSE_INDEX_FILE), help="上证综指缓存 csv")
    parser.add_argument("--profile", choices=["default", "conservative"], default="default", help="选定输出 profile")
    parser.add_argument("--write-artifacts", action="store_true", help="写出 shadow 曲线/摘要/live payload")
    parser.add_argument("--output-prefix", default="dual_factor_shadow", help="输出前缀，仅在 --write-artifacts 时生效")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    live_json_path = Path(args.live_json).expanduser().resolve() if args.live_json else discover_latest_live_json()
    formal_params_path = Path(args.formal_params).expanduser().resolve()
    robustness_path = Path(args.robustness).expanduser().resolve()
    sse_index_file = Path(args.sse_index_file).expanduser().resolve()

    formal_params = load_json(formal_params_path) if formal_params_path.exists() else None
    robustness = load_json(robustness_path) if robustness_path.exists() else None
    profiles = build_profiles(formal_params)

    live_payload, baseline_curve_path, baseline_curve = load_live_payload(live_json_path)
    baseline_metrics = normalize_metrics(baseline_curve)
    market_close = load_market_close(baseline_curve.index)
    sse_index = load_sse_index(baseline_curve.index, sse_index_file)

    snapshots: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    curve_frames: dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}
    for profile_name, profile in profiles.items():
        snapshot, curve_df = build_profile_snapshot(
            profile_name=profile_name,
            profile=profile,
            baseline_curve=baseline_curve,
            market_close=market_close,
            sse_index=sse_index,
        )
        snapshots[profile_name] = snapshot
        curve_frames[profile_name] = curve_df

    selected_snapshot = snapshots[args.profile]
    date_tag = str(live_payload.get("date") or datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d"))
    prefix = f"{args.output_prefix}_{args.profile}_{date_tag}"
    shadow_curve_path = REPORT_DIR / f"{prefix}_curve.csv"
    shadow_summary_path = REPORT_DIR / f"{prefix}_summary.json"
    shadow_live_json_path = REPORT_DIR / f"{prefix}_live_payload.json"

    summary = {
        "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "integration_mode": "shadow_only",
        "formal_version": str((formal_params or {}).get("formal_version") or "dual_factor_rsv5_roc10_v1"),
        "live_system_path": str(live_json_path),
        "baseline_curve_path": str(baseline_curve_path),
        "selected_profile": args.profile,
        "baseline_metrics": baseline_metrics,
        "profiles": snapshots,
        "selected_runtime_shadow_inputs": selected_snapshot["runtime_shadow_inputs"],
        "validated_reference_metrics": (formal_params or {}).get("validated_metrics") if isinstance(formal_params, dict) else None,
        "shadow_metrics_note": "profiles.*.metrics 为当前集成脚本按 live_system combo_curve 实时重算的 shadow 指标；正式立项口径仍以 dual_factor_formal_params.json / dual_factor_robustness_report.json 为准。",
        "integration_entrypoints": {
            "live_system_source": "research/reports/live_system_v1_*.json",
            "combo_curve": str(baseline_curve_path),
            "paper_runtime_reader": "scripts/prepare_paper_orders_v1.py -> runtime_date_utils.load_runtime_metrics_for_date()",
            "panel_risk_generator": "scripts/generate_per_panel_runtime_risk_t05.py",
        },
        "recommended_actions": [
            "保持 baseline live_system_v1 不变，先生成 dual_factor shadow 产物。",
            "用 selected_runtime_shadow_inputs 对照 runtime risk / paper orders diff，不直接改主链路。",
            "若 shadow 连续验证通过，再做 feature flag 级别的灰度接入。",
        ],
        "robustness_reference": robustness.get("summary") if isinstance(robustness, dict) else None,
    }

    if args.write_artifacts:
        REPORT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        curve_frames[args.profile].to_csv(shadow_curve_path, index=False)
        shadow_summary_path.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        shadow_payload = build_shadow_live_payload(
            baseline_payload=live_payload,
            baseline_curve_path=baseline_curve_path,
            baseline_metrics=baseline_metrics,
            selected_snapshot=selected_snapshot,
            shadow_curve_path=shadow_curve_path,
            summary_path=shadow_summary_path,
        )
        shadow_live_json_path.write_text(json.dumps(shadow_payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        summary["artifact_files"] = {
            "shadow_curve": str(shadow_curve_path),
            "shadow_summary": str(shadow_summary_path),
            "shadow_live_payload": str(shadow_live_json_path),
        }

    print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# 双因子正式集成计划（ROC10 + RSV5）

## 一、结论

- **正式方案版本**：`dual_factor_rsv5_roc10_v1`
- **当前建议**：建议进入“代码集成 + 模拟盘灰度”下一阶段
- **readiness 结论**：**ready_with_guardrails**
- **原因**：
  - 全样本（2015-01-06 ~ 2026-03-31）下，双因子默认参数相对 baseline 从 **68.39% / 23.31% / 2.364**（年化 / 最大回撤 / 夏普）提升到 **103.08% / 20.70% / 3.182**。
  - 近端窗口（2024年以来、2025年以来）延续优于 baseline / ROC10 / RSV5 单因子。
  - conservative 版本仍优于 baseline，说明框架具备收敛后继续保留增益的能力。
  - 但当前仍主要是历史收益曲线 overlay 口径，**还没有完成交易摩擦、容量与实时数据异常的纸盘并行验证**，因此不应直接替换主链路。

---

## 二、正式接入方式（不改坏主生产脚本）

### 1. 接入原则

双因子只作为 **live_system_v1 的日度风险预算 overlay**，而不是替代原有：

- 选股逻辑
- 合并信号逻辑
- 下单执行逻辑

即保持当前 `run_live_system_v1.py` 产出的 baseline 组合不变，再对其 `combo_curve.daily_return` 叠加一个双因子乘数：

```text
baseline_daily_return
    × roc10_multiplier
    × rsv5_multiplier
= dual_factor_daily_return
```

### 2. 现有链路中的正式落点

#### 基线来源
- `scripts/run_live_system_v1.py`
- 输出：`research/reports/live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json`
- 其中 `files.combo_curve` 指向 `live_system_v1_combo_curve_YYYYMMDD.csv`

#### 双因子集成脚本
- `scripts/integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py`

该脚本的职责：
1. 读取当日 `live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json`
2. 读取其对应的 `combo_curve`
3. 复用正式参数与稳健性结论
4. 生成 **shadow 版本** 的 dual factor 指标与 runtime shadow inputs
5. 输出可供后续纸盘灰度使用的 shadow payload / summary / curve（按需通过 `--write-artifacts` 落盘）

### 3. 双因子 regime 的信号口径

#### ROC10 因子
- 来源：`run_strategy_695_batch.load_market_matrices(max_symbols=180)` 的市场均价序列
- 定义：10 日 ROC
- 规则：
  - `ROC10 > 0` → 放大
  - `ROC10 < 0` → 收缩
  - `ROC10 = 0` → 中性

#### RSV5 因子
- 来源：`/Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/daily_stock_analysis/index_000001_SH.csv`
- 定义：上证综指 5 日 RSV 相对 60 日 rolling median
- 规则：
  - `RSV5 > rolling_median` → 放大
  - `RSV5 <= rolling_median` → 收缩

### 4. 默认参数与 conservative 参数

#### 默认参数（正式候选）
- ROC10：`window=10, bull=1.15, bear=0.85`
- RSV5：`window=5, median_window=60, median_min_periods=20, bull=1.10, bear=0.90`

#### conservative 参数（灰度保守档）
- ROC10：`window=10, bull=1.10, bear=0.90`
- RSV5：`window=5, median_window=60, median_min_periods=20, bull=1.05, bear=0.95`

### 5. 推荐的非侵入式接入命令

#### 先生成 shadow 摘要（不落盘）
```bash
python3 scripts/integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py \
  --live-json research/reports/live_system_v1_20260402.json \
  --profile default
```

#### 生成 shadow 产物（落盘，但不替换 baseline）
```bash
python3 scripts/integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py \
  --live-json research/reports/live_system_v1_20260402.json \
  --profile default \
  --write-artifacts
```

### 6. 为什么当前推荐 shadow 接入而不是直接替换 combo_v1

因为现有 runtime / paper 链路默认读取：

- `runtime_date_utils.load_runtime_metrics_for_date()` → `live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json` → `combo_v1`
- `prepare_paper_orders_v1.py` 进一步用这些运行时指标生成风控与订单计划

如果此时直接把 `combo_v1` 替换成双因子结果，会把：
- 风控阈值触发逻辑
- panel risk
- paper 下单预算
- halt / risk_off 判断

一次性全部改掉，难以定位问题来源。

所以当前正确做法是：
- **baseline 留在主链路**
- **dual factor 作为 shadow live payload 并行输出**
- 先比较 runtime gate / paper orders / panel risk 差异，再决定是否 feature flag 切换

---

## 三、纸盘链路接入准备

### 1. 当前纸盘链路

现有主链路大致为：

```text
run_live_system_v1.py
  -> live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json
  -> runtime_risk_state_latest.json
  -> generate_per_panel_runtime_risk_t05.py
  -> prepare_paper_orders_v1.py
  -> paper orders / diagnostics / brief
```

### 2. 双因子 shadow 的建议链路

建议增加一条**并行 shadow 链路**：

```text
run_live_system_v1.py
  -> baseline live_system_v1_YYYYMMDD.json
  -> integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py
  -> dual_factor shadow summary / shadow live payload
  -> 仅用于 shadow runtime gate 对照
  -> 仅用于 shadow paper diff 对照
```

### 3. 纸盘阶段必须验证的对象

#### A. runtime gate 对照
对比 baseline vs dual shadow：
- `strategy_max_dd_pct`
- `strategy_sharpe`
- `risk_off`
- `halt_new_buy`
- `gross_scale`
- `gate_reasons`

#### B. panel risk 对照
结合：
- `scripts/generate_per_panel_runtime_risk_t05.py`

需要验证：
- aggressive / balanced / defensive 三盘在 dual shadow 下的阈值表现
- 是否出现比 baseline 更早或更频繁的误停
- 是否出现 panel 之间分化异常放大

#### C. paper orders 对照
结合：
- `scripts/prepare_paper_orders_v1.py`

需要验证：
- candidate approved rows
- candidate order rows
- candidate ticket rows
- executable buy rows / sell rows
- blocked_buy_halt
- blocked_buy_budget_cap
- order diagnostics root_cause

### 4. 纸盘门禁（必须满足）

1. **不直接替换主链路**
2. **先 shadow，再灰度**
3. **至少保留 baseline / dual 两套并行日志**
4. **必须保留一键回退能力**（baseline 仍为默认真相源）
5. **若指数缓存/市场均价数据不新鲜，则 dual shadow 直接失效并回退 baseline**
6. **不得在未完成 diff 验证前，把 dual shadow 用作真实下单真相源**

---

## 四、最小落地顺序（1/2/3）

### 1）先接入 shadow 产物生成
- 保持 `run_live_system_v1.py` 不变
- 每次 live_system_v1 产出后，补跑 `scripts/integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py`
- 生成 dual factor shadow summary / live payload / curve

### 2）再做模拟盘 shadow 对照
- 用 shadow 指标并行比对 runtime risk / panel risk / paper orders
- 不替换 `runtime_risk_state_latest*.json` 主来源
- 只做 diff 审核与日志沉淀

### 3）最后再做 feature flag 灰度接入
- 新增开关（例如 `dual_factor_overlay_profile=default|conservative|off`）
- 仅对单一纸盘或单一 profile 灰度
- 连续通过后，再考虑进入更深一层的准实盘研究链路

---

## 五、最终判断

### 是否建议进入下一阶段？
**建议。**

### 但进入方式是什么？
不是“直接替换正式主链路”，而是：

- **进入代码集成阶段：可以**
- **进入模拟盘灰度阶段：可以**
- **进入主链路直接替换阶段：暂不建议**

这也是本轮 readiness 定义为 **ready_with_guardrails** 而不是 `ready` 的核心原因。

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

import run_meta_combo_backtest as meta

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
REPORT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "research" / "reports"
BENCH_CSV = Path("/Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/daily_stock_analysis/index_000852_SH.csv")


@dataclass
class MetaParams:
    label: str
    rebalance: str
    benchmark: str
    bull_lev: float
    mid_lev: float
    bear_lev: float
    max_gross: float
    defense_gross_cap: float
    weekly_stop_trigger: float
    stop_scale: float
    cooldown_days: int


def calc_metrics(daily_ret: pd.Series) -> dict:
    series = daily_ret.dropna().astype(float)
    if series.empty:
        return {
            "annual_return_pct": 0.0,
            "annual_vol_pct": 0.0,
            "sharpe": 0.0,
            "max_drawdown_pct": 0.0,
            "annual_minus_drawdown_pct": 0.0,
            "final_equity": 1.0,
            "trading_days": 0,
        }

    equity = (1 + series).cumprod()
    annual = float(equity.iloc[-1] ** (252 / len(series)) - 1)
    annual_vol = float(series.std(ddof=0) * np.sqrt(252))
    sharpe = annual / annual_vol if annual_vol > 0 else 0.0
    peak = equity.cummax()
    max_dd = float(((peak - equity) / peak).max())
    return {
        "annual_return_pct": round(annual * 100, 2),
        "annual_vol_pct": round(annual_vol * 100, 2),
        "sharpe": round(sharpe, 3),
        "max_drawdown_pct": round(max_dd * 100, 2),
        "annual_minus_drawdown_pct": round(annual * 100 - max_dd * 100, 2),
        "final_equity": round(float(equity.iloc[-1]), 4),
        "trading_days": int(len(series)),
    }


def benchmark_regime(index: pd.DatetimeIndex) -> pd.DataFrame:
    bench = pd.read_csv(BENCH_CSV)
    date_col = "trade_date" if "trade_date" in bench.columns else "date"
    bench["date"] = pd.to_datetime(bench[date_col].astype(str), errors="coerce")
    bench = bench.dropna(subset=["date"]).sort_values("date")
    bench = bench[["date", "close"]].dropna()
    bench = bench.set_index("date").reindex(index).ffill()

    close = bench["close"]
    ma50 = close.rolling(50).mean()
    ma120 = close.rolling(120).mean()
    day_ret = close.pct_change().fillna(0.0)

    regime = pd.Series("neutral", index=index)
    regime[(close > ma50) & (ma50 > ma120)] = "bull"
    regime[(close < ma120)] = "bear"
    regime[day_ret <= -0.02] = "crash"

    return pd.DataFrame({"close": close, "ma50": ma50, "ma120": ma120, "regime": regime, "bench_ret": day_ret})


def load_qlib_baseline() -> dict:
    qlib_json = REPORT_DIR / "qlib_phase2_baseline_20260306.json"
    if qlib_json.exists():
        return json.loads(qlib_json.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {
        "note": "qlib baseline not found",
        "annualized_return_excess_with_cost_pct": None,
        "max_drawdown_excess_with_cost_pct": None,
        "ic": None,
        "rank_ic": None,
    }


def run_meta_line(
    returns: pd.DataFrame,
    market_close: pd.Series,
    params: MetaParams,
) -> tuple[dict, pd.DataFrame]:
    summary, curve, _ = meta.run_meta(
        returns=returns,
        market_close=market_close,
        benchmark_code=params.benchmark,
        k=4,
        rebalance=params.rebalance,
        bull_lev=params.bull_lev,
        mid_lev=params.mid_lev,
        bear_lev=params.bear_lev,
        max_gross=params.max_gross,
        trade_cost=0.0008,
        score_vol_weight=0.4,
        score_dd_weight=0.4,
        defense_gross_cap=params.defense_gross_cap,
        weekly_stop_trigger=params.weekly_stop_trigger,
        stop_scale=params.stop_scale,
        cooldown_days=params.cooldown_days,
    )
    curve = curve.copy()
    curve["date"] = pd.to_datetime(curve["date"])
    return summary, curve


def resonance_factor(weekly: pd.Series, monthly: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    """多指标共振信号：周线和月线方向对齐时放大仓位，分歧时收敛。

    共振系数：
    - 周线 + 月线同向（共振）：×1.20
    - 周线 + 月线反向（分歧）：×0.60
    - 其余（无明确方向）：×0.90
    """
    w = weekly.rolling(5).mean()
    m = monthly.rolling(5).mean()
    common = w.index.intersection(m.index)
    w_a = w.loc[common]
    m_a = m.loc[common]
    # 方向：+1（正收益） 或 -1（负收益）
    w_dir = (w_a > 0).astype(int) * 2 - 1
    m_dir = (m_a > 0).astype(int) * 2 - 1
    res = pd.Series(0.90, index=common, dtype=float)
    res[w_dir == m_dir] = 1.20   # 共振放大
    res[w_dir == -m_dir] = 0.60   # 反向收敛
    # 平滑3天，避免切换过于频繁
    return res.rolling(3, min_periods=1).mean()


def optimize_combo(
    weekly: pd.Series,
    monthly: pd.Series,
    regime_df: pd.DataFrame,
    enable_resonance: bool = True,
) -> tuple[dict, pd.DataFrame]:
    frame = pd.DataFrame({"weekly": weekly, "monthly": monthly}).dropna()
    frame = frame.join(regime_df[["regime"]], how="left")

    # 共振系数（已对齐到frame索引）
    if enable_resonance:
        res = resonance_factor(weekly, monthly).reindex(frame.index).ffill().bfill().fillna(0.90)
        resonance_label = "开"
    else:
        res = pd.Series(1.0, index=frame.index)
        resonance_label = "关"

    best = None
    best_curve = None

    for bull in [1.0, 1.2, 1.4, 1.6, 1.8, 2.0]:
        for neutral in [0.8, 1.0, 1.2, 1.4]:
            for bear in [0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9]:
                for crash in [0.15, 0.25, 0.35]:
                    regime_scale = {
                        "bull": bull,
                        "neutral": neutral,
                        "bear": bear,
                        "crash": crash,
                    }

                    gross = frame["regime"].map(regime_scale).fillna(1.0)
                    # 小市值线偏进攻，宽基线偏防守
                    # 共振信号直接乘到组合收益率上
                    raw = 0.62 * frame["weekly"] + 0.38 * frame["monthly"]
                    combo_ret = gross * res * raw
                    metrics = calc_metrics(combo_ret)

                    objective = metrics["annual_return_pct"] + 6 * metrics["sharpe"] - 0.55 * metrics["max_drawdown_pct"]
                    candidate = {
                        "bull_gross": bull,
                        "neutral_gross": neutral,
                        "bear_gross": bear,
                        "crash_gross": crash,
                        "resonance": resonance_label,
                        "objective": round(objective, 3),
                        **metrics,
                    }

                    if metrics["max_drawdown_pct"] <= 25.0:
                        hard_ok = True
                    else:
                        hard_ok = False

                    if best is None:
                        best = (hard_ok, objective, candidate)
                        best_curve = pd.DataFrame({
                            "date": frame.index,
                            "daily_return": combo_ret.values,
                            "gross": gross.values,
                            "resonance": res.values,
                        })
                        continue

                    prev_ok, prev_obj, _ = best
                    if (hard_ok and not prev_ok) or (hard_ok == prev_ok and objective > prev_obj):
                        best = (hard_ok, objective, candidate)
                        best_curve = pd.DataFrame({
                            "date": frame.index,
                            "daily_return": combo_ret.values,
                            "gross": gross.values,
                            "resonance": res.values,
                        })

    if best is None or best_curve is None:
        raise RuntimeError("组合优化失败")

    best_curve["equity"] = (1 + best_curve["daily_return"]).cumprod()
    peak = best_curve["equity"].cummax()
    best_curve["drawdown"] = (peak - best_curve["equity"]) / peak
    return best[2], best_curve


def main() -> None:
    REPORT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d")

    strategy_ids = [
        "2024_101",
        "2024_180",
        "2025_038",
        "2020_073",
        "2024_182",
        "2025_024",
        "2023_018",
        "2024_168",   # event_driven 新增（替换 2025_028）
    ]

    returns = meta.build_base_returns(strategy_ids=strategy_ids, max_symbols=180)
    close, _, _, _, _ = meta.batch.load_market_matrices(max_symbols=180)
    market_close = close.mean(axis=1, skipna=True).reindex(returns.index).ffill()

    weekly_params = MetaParams(
        label="smallcap_weekly",

        bull_lev=3.3,

    )
    monthly_params = MetaParams(

    weekly_summary, weekly_curve = run_meta_line(returns=returns, market_close=market_close, params=weekly_params)
    monthly_summary, monthly_curve = run_meta_line(returns=returns, market_close=market_close, params=monthly_params)

    weekly_ret = weekly_curve.set_index("date")["daily_return"]
    monthly_ret = monthly_curve.set_index("date")["daily_return"]

    regime_df = benchmark_regime(weekly_ret.index.union(monthly_ret.index))
    combo_summary, combo_curve = optimize_combo(weekly=weekly_ret, monthly=monthly_ret, regime_df=regime_df, enable_resonance=True)

    qlib_summary = load_qlib_baseline()

    out_json = REPORT_DIR / f"live_system_v1_{stamp}.json"

    combo_curve.to_csv(out_curve, index=False)

    out_md.write_text(md + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
T05 Step 1: Generate per-panel runtime risk state files.
Reads the global runtime_risk_state_latest.json as base,
then applies per-panel thresholds from panel_profile_registry,
writing aggressive/balanced/defensive variants.
"""
import json, sys
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.parent
REPORT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "research" / "reports"
sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_ROOT))

from scripts.panel_profile_registry import PROFILE_RUNTIME_RISK_CONFIG

def load_global_risk():
    path = REPORT_DIR / "runtime_risk_state_latest.json"
    if not path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Global runtime risk state not found: {path}")
    with open(path) as f:
        return json.load(f)

def load_paper_latest_metrics(profile_slug: str) -> Optional[dict]:
    """Load the latest paper trading metrics for a given profile slug.
    Returns None if no metrics file exists yet.
    """
    files = sorted((REPORT_DIR).glob(f"paper_{profile_slug}_trading_metrics_*.json"))
    if not files:
        return None
    with open(files[-1]) as f:
        return json.load(f)

def get_paper_real_drawdown(profile_slug: str) -> Optional[float]:
    """Get paper account's real max_drawdown_pct from its latest metrics.
    Returns None if no metrics file is available (fallback to live_system data).
    """
    metrics = load_paper_latest_metrics(profile_slug)
    if metrics is None:
        return None
    dd = metrics.get("metrics", {}).get("max_drawdown_pct")
    if dd is not None:
        return float(dd)
    return None

def compute_panel_risk(global_risk: dict, profile_slug: str) -> dict:
    """Build a per-panel runtime risk state with panel-level halt logic.
    
    进取方案核心修复：使用纸盘自己的真实最大回撤，
    而不是 live_system_v1 的11年回测回撤（24.51%），
    避免纸盘被历史回测数据错误地halt。
    """
    cfg = PROFILE_RUNTIME_RISK_CONFIG.get(profile_slug, {})
    halt_pct = cfg.get("strategy_max_drawdown_halt_pct", 15.0)
    riskoff_pct = cfg.get("strategy_max_drawdown_riskoff_pct", 10.0)
    
    global_metrics = global_risk.get("runtime_metrics", {})
    # 进取方案：优先用纸盘自己的真实回撤；没有则降级用全局live_system数据
    current_dd = get_paper_real_drawdown(profile_slug)
    if current_dd is None:
        current_dd = global_metrics.get("strategy_max_dd_pct", 0.0)
    
    # Panel-level halt decision
    halt_new_buy = current_dd >= halt_pct
    risk_off = current_dd >= riskoff_pct
    
    # Gate reasons
    gate_reasons = []
    if risk_off:
        gate_reasons.append(f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= {riskoff_pct:.4f}")
    if halt_new_buy:
        gate_reasons.append(f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= HALT_THRESHOLD({halt_pct:.4f})")
    
    # Build the panel runtime risk state
    # NOTE: The base_runtime section contains a nested runtime_truth (pre-computed
    # from global thresholds) which overrides our panel-level fields when read
    # by runtime_state_schema.get_runtime_truth(). We must also override that
    # nested runtime_truth with the correct per-panel halt decision.
    per_panel_rt = {
        "state": "risk_off" if risk_off else ("normal" if not halt_new_buy else "halted"),
        "state_reason": f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= {riskoff_pct:.4f}" if risk_off else "",
        "trading_status": "BUY_HALT" if halt_new_buy else "TRADING",
        "trading_status_reason": f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= {halt_pct:.4f}" if halt_new_buy else "per_panel_ok",
        "trading_status_label_cn": "禁止买入" if halt_new_buy else "正常交易",
        "mode": "cautious" if risk_off else ("normal" if not halt_new_buy else "halted"),
        "risk_off": risk_off,
        "hard_stop": False,
        "halt_new_buy": halt_new_buy,
        "gate_reasons": gate_reasons,
        "buy_authorized": not halt_new_buy,
        "trading_ready": not halt_new_buy,
        "severity": "RED" if halt_new_buy else ("YELLOW" if risk_off else "GREEN"),
        "source": f"per_panel_t05_{profile_slug}",
        "pipeline_ok": True,
        "precheck_passed": None,
        "advice_only": True,
    }

    panel_risk = {
        **global_risk,
        "generated_at": global_risk.get("generated_at", ""),
        "panel": profile_slug,
        "panel_halt_threshold_pct": halt_pct,
        "panel_riskoff_threshold_pct": riskoff_pct,
        "runtime_metrics": {
            **global_metrics,
            "panel_strategy_max_dd_pct": current_dd,
        },
        # Override top-level runtime_truth so get_runtime_truth() picks up per-panel values
        "runtime_truth": per_panel_rt,
        # Override latest_runtime too (fallback path in get_runtime_truth)
        "latest_runtime": {
            **(global_risk.get("latest_runtime") or {}),
            "mode": per_panel_rt["mode"],
            "risk_off": risk_off,
            "hard_stop": False,
            "halt_new_buy": halt_new_buy,
            "halt_reason": f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= {halt_pct:.4f}" if halt_new_buy else "",
            "gate_reasons": gate_reasons,
            "runtime_truth": per_panel_rt,
        },
        "base_runtime": {
            **(global_risk.get("base_runtime") or {}),
            "mode": per_panel_rt["mode"],
            "halt_new_buy": halt_new_buy,
            "risk_off": risk_off,
            "halt_reason": f"strategy_max_drawdown_pct({current_dd:.4f}) >= {halt_pct:.4f}" if halt_new_buy else "",
            "gate_reasons": gate_reasons,
            "runtime_truth": per_panel_rt,
        },
        "note": f"Per-panel runtime risk truth for {profile_slug}: halt>@{halt_pct}%(dd={current_dd}%), riskoff>@{riskoff_pct}%",
    }
    return panel_risk

def main():
    global_risk = load_global_risk()
    
    for profile_slug in ["aggressive", "balanced", "defensive"]:
        panel_risk = compute_panel_risk(global_risk, profile_slug)
        out_path = REPORT_DIR / f"runtime_risk_state_latest_{profile_slug}.json"
        with open(out_path, "w") as f:
            json.dump(panel_risk, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        # 进取方案：同时打印paper真实DD（已注入到panel_risk["runtime_metrics"]）
        br = panel_risk["base_runtime"]
        paper_dd = panel_risk["runtime_metrics"].get("panel_strategy_max_dd_pct")
        live_dd = global_risk["runtime_metrics"]["strategy_max_dd_pct"]
        print(f"  {profile_slug}: halt={br['halt_new_buy']}, risk_off={br['risk_off']}, "
              f"halt_pct={panel_risk['panel_halt_threshold_pct']}%, "
              f"paper_dd={paper_dd:.4f}% (live_sys={live_dd}%)")
    
    print(f"\nGenerated 3 per-panel runtime risk files in {REPORT_DIR}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
